languages.text: "Семнадцать четыреста один, сколько ксенос извлек из тебя элементов?"
"One-seven-four-zero-one, how many components did the xenos extract from you?"
languages.original_text: "Семнадцать четыреста один, сколько ксенос извлек из тебя элементов?"

traits.locale_text: "Seventeen-four-oh-one, how many components did the xenos extract from you?"

languages.text: "Eins-sieben-vier-null-eins, wie viele Komponenten hat Euch der Xenos entnommen?"

traits.locale_text: "Eins-sieben-vier-null-eins, wie viele Komponenten hat Euch der Xenos entnommen?"

languages.text: « Un sept quatre zéro un, combien de composants le xénos vous a-t-il retirés ? »

languages.original_text: "One-seven-four-zero-one, how many components did the xenos extract from you?"

languages.text: "On yedi-dört-sıfır-bir, zenolar senden kaç bileşen çıkardı?"
languages.original_text: "One-seven-four-zero-one, how many components did the xenos extract from you?"

traits.locale_text: "On yedi-dört-sıfır-bir, zenolar senden kaç bileşen çıkardı?"

languages.text: “1-7-4-0-1，那异形从你身上拆走了多少个部件？”
languages.original_text: "One-seven-four-zero-one, how many components did the xenos extract from you?"

traits.locale_text: “1-7-4-0-1，那异形从你身上拆走了多少个部件？”

languages.text: 「一七四〇一、異種族はお前から、いくつの成分を摘出した？」

traits.locale_text: 「一七四〇一、異種族はお前から、いくつの成分を摘出した？」
